entries.name: Useful supplies
entries.description: Rope, rations, lamp oil, dry clothes or local tools useful in Gwynneth.

entries.name: Local trinket
entries.description: A small object with cultural ties to Gwynneth; useful as flavour or clue.

entries.name: Coin and trade goods
entries.description: A modest pouch of coin, gems, trade bars or goods with local value.

entries.name: Potion or charm
entries.description: A low-power potion, charm, antidote or blessed token.

entries.name: Map fragment
entries.description: A partial map, route note or coded direction connected to Gwynneth.

entries.name: Rare local prize
entries.description: A notable item tied to a faction, ruin or powerful NPC in Gwynneth.
